# doit_active_theme (Data Source)

Retrieve the active color theme for the current account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "doit_active_theme" "current" {}

output "active_theme_id" {
  value = data.doit_active_theme.current.theme_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `theme_id` (String) Identifier of the active theme. The reserved sentinel `"default"` is
returned when the user is using the built-in default (no custom or
preset theme stored).

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
